grammar_points.title: 通过 — Through / By means of
grammar_points.explanation: 通过 is a preposition meaning 'through' or 'by means of'. It indicates the method or channel used to achieve something. Structure: 通过 + Method/Channel + Subject + Verb + Result. It can also be used as a verb meaning 'to pass' (e.g., an exam). As a preposition, it answers the question 'How?'. Example: 通过努力，他成功了。(Through hard work, he succeeded.)

examples.chinese: 通过招聘，公司找到了有技术的员工。
examples.pinyin: Tōng guò zhāo pìn, gōng sī zhǎo dào le yǒu jì shù de yuán gōng.
examples.english: Through recruitment, the company found technically skilled employees.

examples.chinese: 他通过丰富的工作经历成为了一名成功的管理者。
examples.pinyin: Tā tōng guò fēng fù de gōng zuò jīng lì chéng wéi le yì míng chéng gōng de guǎn lǐ zhě.
examples.english: Through rich work experience, he became a successful manager.

exercises.question: _____ 积累经验，他成为了一名优秀的记者。
Choose the correct sentence with 通过.
exercises.correct: 通过努力学习，她成为了博士。
options: 通过努力学习，她成为了博士。
她通过了努力学习，成为博士。
努力通过学习，她成为了博士。
她成为博士通过努力学习。
option_pinyin: Tōng guò nǔ lì xué xí, tā chéng wéi le bó shì.
Tā tōng guò le nǔ lì xué xí, chéng wéi bó shì.
Nǔ lì tōng guò xué xí, tā chéng wéi le bó shì.
Tā chéng wéi bó shì tōng guò nǔ lì xué xí.

mini_exercises.correct: Through X / By means of X (a method, channel, or process)
options: Through X / By means of X (a method, channel, or process)
Because of X (a reason or cause)

grammar_points.title: 继续 — To continue (aspect usage)
grammar_points.explanation: 继续 means 'to continue' and is placed before a verb to indicate that an action is ongoing or resumes after a pause. Structure: Subject + 继续 + Verb (+ Object). It emphasizes continuation of an action that was already in progress. Example: 他继续工作，没有休息。(He continued working without resting.) 继续 can also appear as a standalone verb: 请继续！(Please continue!)

examples.chinese: 她继续积累经验，希望职业发展得更好。
examples.pinyin: Tā jì xù jī lěi jīng yàn, xī wàng zhí yè fā zhǎn de gèng hǎo.
examples.english: She continues to accumulate experience, hoping her career will develop better.

examples.chinese: 他继续负责这个项目，直到成功。
examples.pinyin: Tā jì xù fù zé zhè ge xiàng mù, zhí dào chéng gōng.
examples.english: He continues to be responsible for this project until it succeeds.

options: 他继续管理公司，不会退休。

Tā guǎn lǐ jì xù gōng sī, bú huì tuì xiū.
Tā jì xù, guǎn lǐ gōng sī bú huì tuì xiū.
Jì xù tā guǎn lǐ gōng sī, bú huì tuì xiū.

To start doing something for the first time

jì xù tā men tǎo lùn méi yǒu tíng xià lái
tā men méi yǒu tíng xià lái tǎo lùn jì xù le

grammar_points.title: 负责 — To be responsible for
grammar_points.explanation: 负责 means 'to be responsible for' or 'to take charge of'. It can be followed by a noun object (负责 + task/role) or used predicatively (他很负责 — He is very responsible). Structure: Subject + 负责 + Object/Task OR Subject + 很 + 负责. It often appears in professional contexts. Example: 她负责公司的管理工作。(She is responsible for the company's management work.)

examples.chinese: 他负责招聘记者，工作非常认真。
examples.pinyin: Tā fù zé zhāo pìn jì zhě, gōng zuò fēi cháng rèn zhēn.
examples.english: He is responsible for recruiting reporters and works very seriously.

examples.chinese: 她是一个很负责的人，从不推卸责任。
examples.pinyin: Tā shì yí gè hěn fù zé de rén, cóng bù tuī xiè zé rèn.
examples.english: She is a very responsible person who never shirks her responsibilities.

Choose the correct sentence using 负责.
exercises.correct: 她负责教授这门技术课程。
options: 她负责教授这门技术课程。
她这门负责教授技术课程。
教授她负责这门技术课程。
这门她负责，教授技术课程。
option_pinyin: Tā fù zé jiào shòu zhè mén jì shù kè chéng.
Tā zhè mén fù zé jiào shòu jì shù kè chéng.
Jiào shòu tā fù zé zhè mén jì shù kè chéng.
Zhè mén tā fù zé, jiào shòu jì shù kè chéng.

mini_exercises.correct: To be responsible for / in charge of (a task or duty)
options: To be responsible for / in charge of (a task or duty)

options: 他负责这个项目的所有工作。

tā zhè gè xiàng mù fù zé de suǒ yǒu gōng zuò
fù zé tā zhè gè xiàng mù suǒ yǒu gōng zuò
zhè gè xiàng mù tā suǒ yǒu gōng zuò fù zé

culture_notes.title: Teach a Man to Fish
culture_notes.title_chinese: 授人以鱼不如授人以渔
culture_notes.content: The Chinese proverb 授人以鱼不如授人以渔 (Shòu rén yǐ yú bù rú shòu rén yǐ yú) — 'Give a man a fish and you feed him for a day; teach a man to fish and you feed him for a lifetime' — reflects the deeply Chinese value of education, self-development, and the transmission of skills over generations. In the workplace, this philosophy shapes how Chinese employers think about training and career development. A good mentor (导师, dǎo shī) is expected not just to assign tasks, but to teach skills and methods. This Confucian principle also underpins the Chinese emphasis on formal education, vocational training, and lifelong learning as keys to professional success.

idioms.chinese: 授人以鱼不如授人以渔
idioms.pinyin: shòu rén yǐ yú bù rú shòu rén yǐ yú
idioms.english: Teaching skills is better than giving handouts

quiz.question: What is the difference between 经历 and 经验?
quiz.correct: 经历 refers to events experienced; 经验 refers to knowledge gained
options: 经历 refers to events experienced; 经验 refers to knowledge gained
They mean exactly the same thing
经历 is formal; 经验 is informal
经历 is a verb only; 经验 is a noun only

quiz.question: Fill in: _____ 积累经验，他终于成功了。
What does 通过 mean as a preposition?
Choose the correct use of 继续.
He is responsible for managing the team. Which sentence is correct?

What does the proverb 授人以鱼不如授人以渔 mean?
quiz.correct: Teaching skills is better than giving handouts
options: Teaching skills is better than giving handouts
Hard work always leads to success
Friendship is more important than money
Education is the key to happiness

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 请介绍一下你的工作经历和技术背景。
lines.pinyin: Qǐng jiè shào yí xià nǐ de gōng zuò jīng lì hé jì shù bèi jǐng.
lines.english: Please introduce your work experience and technical background.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我毕业后通过实习，积累了三年的管理经验，现在希望应聘这个职位。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ bì yè hòu tōng guò shí xí jī lěi le sān nián de guǎn lǐ jīng yàn, xiàn zài xī wàng yìng pìn zhè ge zhí wèi.
lines.english: After graduation, I accumulated three years of management experience through internships, and I now hope to apply for this position.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 好的。你是否愿意负责我们的新项目？
lines.pinyin: Hǎo de. Nǐ shì fǒu yuàn yì fù zé wǒ men de xīn xiàng mù?
lines.english: Good. Are you willing to be responsible for our new project?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 当然愿意！我希望通过这份工作继续提高我的职业技术。
lines.pinyin: Dāng rán yuàn yì! Wǒ xī wàng tōng guò zhè fèn gōng zuò jì xù tí gāo wǒ de zhí yè jì shù.
lines.english: Of course I am willing! I hope to continue improving my professional skills through this work.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我们也在招聘一名记者来负责对外宣传，你有兴趣吗？
lines.pinyin: Wǒ men yě zài zhāo pìn yì míng jì zhě lái fù zé duì wài xuān chuán, nǐ yǒu xìng qù ma?
lines.english: We are also recruiting a reporter to handle external publicity. Are you interested?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我更希望成为项目管理者，这比较符合我的经验和背景.
lines.pinyin: Wǒ gèng xī wàng chéng wéi xiàng mù guǎn lǐ zhě, zhè bǐ jiào fú hé wǒ de jīng yàn hé bèi jǐng
lines.english: I hope more to become a project manager, This aligns better with my experience and background.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 很好，你是一个很负责任的人，欢迎你加入我们的团队。
lines.pinyin: Hěn hǎo, nǐ shì yí gè hěn fù zé rèn de rén, huān yíng nǐ jiā rù wǒ men de tuán duì.
lines.english: Very good. You are a very responsible person. Welcome to our team.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 王教授，我想成为一名博士，但不知道如何开始职业发展。
lines.pinyin: Wáng jiào shòu, wǒ xiǎng chéng wéi yì míng bó shì, dàn bù zhī dào rú hé kāi shǐ zhí yè fā zhǎn.
lines.english: Professor Wang, I want to become a PhD but I don't know how to begin my career development.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你需要通过学习和研究继续提高你的技术水平, 积累经验。
lines.pinyin: nǐ xū yào tōng guò xué xí hé yán jiū jì xù tí gāo nǐ de jì shù shuǐ píng , jī lěi jīng yàn
lines.english: You need to continue to improve your technical level and accumulate experience through research and study.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我应该负责哪些方面的工作？
lines.pinyin: Wǒ yīng gāi fù zé nǎ xiē fāng miàn de gōng zuò?
lines.english: What aspects of work should I be responsible for?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 先负责基础研究，通过这些经历你会慢慢成长。
lines.pinyin: Xiān fù zé jī chǔ yán jiū, tōng guò zhè xiē jīng lì nǐ huì màn màn chéng zhǎng.
lines.english: Start by being responsible for basic research. Through these experiences you will grow gradually.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Nà chéng gōng de mì jué shì shén me?
lines.english: Then what is the secret to success?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 继续努力，保持负责的态度，通过学习不断提高，成功自然就会来。
lines.pinyin: Jì xù nǔ lì, bǎo chí fù zé de tài dù, tōng guò xué xí bú duàn tí gāo, chéng gōng zì rán jiù huì lái.
lines.english: Keep working hard, maintain a responsible attitude, and keep improving through learning. Success will come naturally.
